titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to isma'il Ibn 'isa
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to isma'il Ibn 'isa

segments: ه عن إسماعيل بن عيسى فقد رويته عن محمّد بن موسى بن المتوكّل- رضي اللّه عنه- قال: حدّثنا عليّ بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه، عن إسماعيل بن عيسى‌.
arabic.text: ه عن إسماعيل بن عيسى فقد رويته عن محمّد بن موسى بن المتوكّل- رضي اللّه عنه- قال: حدّثنا عليّ بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه، عن إسماعيل بن عيسى‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Isma'il ibn 'Isa has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Al-Mutawakkil - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - who said: Ali ibn Ibrahim narrated to us from his father, from Isma'il ibn 'Isa.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Isma'il ibn 'Isa has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Al-Mutawakkil - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - who said: Ali ibn Ibrahim narrated to us from his father, from Isma'il ibn 'Isa.
